name: kabegame-gallery-local
description: Local MCP bundle that bridges to the Kabegame app's MCP server (provider/album/task/surf/image/plugin resources + write tools).
long_description: This MCP Bundle connects to the local Kabegame MCP HTTP endpoint (default http://127.0.0.1:7490/mcp) and exposes defensive, validated tools mirroring the upstream resource schemes (provider:// / album:// / task:// / surf:// / image:// / plugin://) plus the four write tools (set_album_images_order, create_album, add_images_to_album, rename_image). Strict endpoint and timeout controls keep it usable only for local Kabegame instances.

tools.name: read_gallery_provider
tools.description: Read a Kabegame provider:// path (Entry / List / ListWithMeta), with optional `without=children|images` filter.

tools.name: read_image
tools.description: Read full ImageInfo for an image (image://{id}).

tools.name: read_image_metadata
tools.description: Read crawl-time metadata for an image (image://{id}/metadata).

tools.name: read_album
tools.description: List all albums (album://) or fetch one album (album://{id}).

tools.name: read_task
tools.description: List all tasks (task://) or fetch one task (task://{id}).

tools.name: read_surf
tools.description: List all surf records (surf://) or fetch one (surf://{host}).

tools.name: read_plugin
tools.description: List all plugins (trimmed) or fetch a plugin's info / icon / description_template / doc / doc_resource.

tools.name: set_album_images_order
tools.description: Set manual order for up to 100 images in one album operation.

tools.name: create_album
tools.description: Create a new album, optionally nested under a parent album.

tools.name: add_images_to_album
tools.description: Add images to an album (already-present images are skipped); optional explicit ordering.

tools.name: rename_image
tools.description: Update the display name of an image.

kabegame_mcp_endpoint.title: Kabegame MCP endpoint
kabegame_mcp_endpoint.description: Local Kabegame MCP HTTP endpoint URL.

request_timeout_ms.title: Request timeout (ms)
request_timeout_ms.description: Max timeout for each upstream MCP HTTP request.

debug_logging.title: Debug logging
debug_logging.description: Enable verbose debug logs on stderr.
